body:
If you need **same-day garage door spring replacement near Pleasanton** , here are several well-reviewed companies that advertise same-day or emergency service:

  * The Door Doctor (Pleasanton) — Open 24 hours according to business listings. Offers emergency spring replacement and serves Pleasanton, Dublin, Livermore, and San Ramon. [HOME | The Door Doctor](https://www.thedoordoctors.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * AE Garage Door Repair Pleasanton — Open today (8:00 AM–8:00 PM), highly rated, and provides garage door repair services including spring replacement.

  * Ace's Garage Door Repair & Installation (Dublin) — Open 24 hours, over 1,000 reviews, and serves the Tri-Valley area.

  * Boulevard Garage Doors, LLC (Dublin) — Open today with strong local reviews.

  * Mr Garage Door Repair Dublin — Open 24 hours with same-day availability.

Several regional providers also specifically advertise same-day spring replacement in Pleasanton when technicians and parts are available:

  * **Valiant Garage Door** says it commonly completes broken spring replacements the same day for stocked spring sizes. [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * **Precision Garage Door** states it offers same-day repairs seven days a week and stocks replacement springs on service trucks for most one-visit repairs. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Pleasanton CA Garage Door Repair • Same-Day Service | Precision Garage Door](https://mydoorteam.com/locations/california/pleasanton/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If your spring has broken:

  * Avoid operating the garage door, especially if it uses a torsion spring.

  * If the door feels unusually heavy or you heard a loud "bang," the spring is likely broken.

  * Most professional replacements take about **30–60 minutes** once the technician arrives. [How Much Does It Actually Cost to Replace a Garage Door Spring?](https://www.thespruce.com/garage-door-spring-replacement-8635322?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you tell me:

  * your ZIP code (or cross streets), and

  * whether it's a **torsion spring** (mounted above the door) or **extension springs** (along the tracks),

I can narrow the list to the closest companies with the best availability.  

Give feedback
